title: 给你的 AI 工具建个共享大脑!
content: 在 AI 时代，记忆——尤其是人与 AI 之间的共享记忆——已成为至关重要的核心资产。与 Mem0 等主流的被动式记忆工具不同，本解决方案采用了主动采集、跨 IDE 集成、分布式架构及多租户隔离技术，旨在为个人及团队实现无缝、安全的跨设备记忆共享。 https://github…

title: Vibe 了一个小玩具，把游戏声音转成手机的 Haptic 震动
content: Vibe is a small toy app that converts game audio into haptic vibration on a phone. The developer, having played *Hades* on PS5 and found the mobile version lacking tactile feedback, was inspired by Razer’s Pro Controller feature that turns game sounds into HD vibrations. He implemented a low‑spec version using Codex. The project is open source, available at https://github.com/ikanam/GameHaptic/.

title: [开源] Proteus - 一个用于管理和无缝切换 Claude Code Provider 的 CLI 工具，支持并行隔离会话
content: Proteus is an open‑source CLI tool written in Go that simplifies managing multiple Claude Code providers such as Anthropic, DeepSeek, or GLM. Users switch the default provider with `proteus switch <provider>`, automatically updating global configuration. Parallel, isolated sessions are launched via `proteus launch <profile>`, keeping settings separate and enabling concurrent use of different providers. A single YAML file manages tokens and settings, with validation and automatic sync of shared options. Install with Homebrew and configure under `~/.config/proteus/providers.yaml`.
eventKey: proteus-一个用于管理和无缝切换-claude-code-provider-cli
normalizedTitle: 开源 proteus - 一个用于管理和无缝切换 claude code provider 的 cli 工具 支持并行隔离会话

content: China Mobile will launch an AI‑eSIM product at the Mobile Cloud Conference on May 9, 2026 in Suzhou. The eSIM can dynamically access cloud‑hosted models, enabling devices to self‑direct their actions and respond in real time. It targets applications such as AI toys and smart wearables.

title: 东阳光：控股子公司签署算力服务采购框架合同，预计总金额 160 亿元至 190 亿元
content: Dongyangguang (600673.SH) announced that its majority-owned subsidiary, Dongguan Dongyangguang Cloud Intelligence Technology Co., has signed a framework contract with Company A for computational power service procurement. The contract is expected to total between 16 and 19 billion yuan (tax inclusive) and will last 60 months after order acceptance, with monthly service fees. The deal is meant to strengthen the company’s AI computing position, though risks remain that could affect future performance.

title: 由于数据中心电力需求激增 美国电力公司 AEP 将资本计划提高至 780 亿美元
content: US electric utility AEP has raised its five‑year capital investment plan to $78 billion, an 8 % increase over three months ago. The hike is driven by transmission upgrades in the PJM and SPP regions and a new natural‑gas power project in Indiana. A surge in data‑center construction—largely by major tech firms supporting AI—has boosted electricity demand, prompting AEP to expand generation and transmission infrastructure accordingly.

title: 曝三星、SK 海力士、美光 DDR6 内存研发正式启动，速度有望达 DDR5 两倍
content: Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron have begun development of DDR6 memory, even though JEDEC standards are not finalized. Manufacturers are preparing substrates and aiming to produce test samples. DDR6 is expected to reach up to 17.6 Gbps, roughly twice the projected DDR5 speed, with commercial availability slated for 2028–2029. Last year JEDEC released the LPDDR6 standard, which introduces a half-width x6 sub‑channel mode that could enable 512 GB system memory.

title: 近期发现有 v 友购买了正价 Claude/Openai 订阅后，疑似被诱导将账号用于反向代理（反代转 API）。提醒大家：将账号反代为 API 使用属于严重违反 TOS 的行为，一经检测账号将被封禁（返回 401）。
content: Some users who purchased legitimate Claude/OpenAI subscriptions were lured into sharing their accounts for reverse‑proxy API usage, a serious violation of the terms of service. Accounts used this way are blocked (returning 401). The post warns against accepting a single API link and recommends requiring separate email login with 2FA/OAuth. Links to related discussions are provided; the message cautions against deceptive practices that lead to accidental account suspension.

title: DBeaver 26.0.4 发布
content:

新增了去除选定文本或整个脚本首尾空格的选项
解决了 transaction 模式显示错误的问题
修复了使用拖放方式…

title: 英伟达九成生产成本来自亚洲供应商，AI 产能争夺加剧
content: NVIDIA’s production costs are about 90 % supplied by Asian vendors, covering chip foundries, memory suppliers, and server assembly. Its Jetson Thor and DRIVE AGX Thor platforms, based on the Blackwell architecture, compete for TSMC’s 3 nm wafers and use LPDDR5X memory from Asian manufacturers. Tight LPDDR4 supply has led NVIDIA to end some older module lifecycles, pushing customers toward LPDDR5X. Even though NVIDIA invests in U.S. server manufacturing, its AI product line still relies heavily on Asian parts, growing faster than domestic capacity.
eventKey: 英伟达九成生产成本来自亚洲供应商-产能争夺加剧

title: Multimodal RAG with the Gemini API File Search Tool: A Developer Guide
content: Gemini’s File Search tool now supports multimodal retrieval via the gemini‑embedding‑2 model, allowing images and text to be indexed in the same store. Users create a store, upload PDFs and images, and query the store through the API; the model returns grounded answers with citations, including image IDs that can be downloaded. The tool offers managed vector storage, cost‑effective embeddings, native image search, custom metadata filtering, structured output, and detailed chunking options. It enables use cases like visual product search, technical diagram retrieval, and integrated photo‑document analysis.
eventKey: multimodal-rag-gemini-api-file-search
normalizedTitle: multimodal rag with the gemini api file search tool a developer guide
